'''Spetbecca''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who ran the [[Great Hoary Mastmot Trading Station]] on [[Toola/Legends|Toola]] shortly after the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Spetbecca rescued a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Haaken Baranar]] after they were mauled by a [[snow demon]]. While Baranar recovered, Spetbecca was captured by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. Baranar took over the running of the trading post, hopeful that Spetbecca would one day return.

{{Char-stub}}
